prose:
Frontier orbital calculation on TEMPO (2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine-1-oxyl) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell doublet, UKS). Geometry from user-supplied .xyz file (fixed, no re-optimization). SCF converged in 12 cycles. No warnings reported (clean run). Integrity check: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

Key results:
- HOMO energy: −6.3375439 eV
- LUMO energy: −2.4651235 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 3.8724203 eV
- Total energy: −483.88366 Hartree
- Vertical IP (Koopmans): 6.3375 eV
- Vertical EA (Koopmans): 2.4651 eV

The HOMO corresponds to the singly-occupied MO (SOMO) of the persistent N–O• radical. These are Koopmans-theorem orbital energies, not excitation energies.
